user.title: MSNSwitch
user.description: Add a Proxicast MSNSwitch (UIS-622 / UIS-722 / MSNSwitch2). Each device is one config entry — repeat setup for additional units.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device or the API returned an error.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed or API access denied. Check credentials and add Home Assistant's IP to System → API Whitelist on the MSNSwitch.
